creator: jim@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Try updating everybuddy to 0.1.4-2 (I just committed the update) and see 
if it's fixed there.  If it's not, please contact the everybuddy authors 
and explain to them what's going on since there's not really much that we 
(FreeBSD) have to do with it.
